_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforcement mechanisms, exception handling processes, and policy lifecycle management.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Knowledge DG-K-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-T-013 (RC, cosine: 0.451), RC-K-005 (RC, cosine: 0.432).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.1/10 (raw 0.608). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, processes]. NICE-only terms [reauthorization] vs WIDAI-only terms [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.889 (P=0.911, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.043 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 18 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.3%). "Knowledge of reauthorization processes" and "Knowledge of data policy authoring, including policy structure standards, enforc" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.476 < STS 0.608 (gap -0.132). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [reauthorization] and [authoring, data, enforcement] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 17.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, processes]. NICE-only: [reauthorization]. WIDAI-only: [authoring, data, enforcement, exception, handling, lifecycle].
